headlines.title: Correspondents' dinner conspiracies spread so fast that even Trump was alarmed
headlines.description: A flood of misinformation, conspiracy theories and false claims about the shooting at Saturday night’s White House Correspondents' Association dinner spread online at a notable and concerningly speedy rate, mostly about the baseless theory that the incident had been staged.

headlines.title: What's at stake in the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial
headlines.description: Jury selection begins Monday in a federal courtroom in Oakland, California, in a civil trial featuring one tech billionaire, Elon Musk, who is suing another, Sam Altman.

headlines.title: AI is making it very easy for the government to spy on you. Some lawmakers are worried.
Discomfort with modern technology shapes Gen Z's desire to live in the past
headlines.description: Some members of Gen Z are feeling so pessimistic about the future of the country and modern technology that they want to hop in a time machine

headlines.title: Meta says it will lay off 10% of its workforce
headlines.description: Facebook parent Meta is planning to lay off approximately 8,000 employees and eliminate another 6,000 open roles as it seeks to reduce costs.

headlines.title: Taylor Swift files to trademark her voice and likeness in era of AI deepfakes
headlines.description: Taylor Swift is taking new steps to protect her voice and likeness from AI misuse.

headlines.title: Maine Gov. Janet Mills vetoes ban on data center construction
headlines.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills on Friday vetoed a hallmark bill that would have halted the construction of large data centers in the New England state for 18 months

headlines.title: Blanche gives timeline of suspect's movements ahead of correspondents' dinner shooting
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche walked through the timeline of Cole Tomas Allen's travels to Washington, D.C., and his actions at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner.

headlines.title: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots
headlines.description: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots

headlines.title: White House condemns 'political violence' after correspondents' dinner shooting
headlines.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt began a press briefing by thanking the law enforcement response to the White House Correspondents' Association dinner and condemning "political violence" and rising rhetoric in the country.

headlines.title: Suspect Cole Tomas Allen charged with attempting to assassinate President Trump
headlines.description: The man accused of opening fire outside the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner was charged with three counts in his first court appearance, including attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump. Cole Tomas Allen also faces charges of interstate transportation of weapons and discharge of a firearm during a violent crime.

headlines.title: Get an Inside Look at the 'Air Taxi' Set to Revolutionize Travel
headlines.description: An electric-powered Air Taxi, created by California-based Joby, is a cross between a plane and a helicopter and it could revolutionize how we get around, turning a potentially hourslong trip into a short 10-minute ride — all for the price of an Uber. Reporting for TODAY, NBC’s Sam Brock shares a first-hand look at the future of travel and how soon they're expected to launch.
